description: Low-stakes casual question about a preference. Same memory quality as stakes_calibration but casual context. Agent should be relaxed.

memories.content: User mentioned they prefer dark mode in all their applications.
User uses VS Code as their primary editor with the One Dark Pro theme.

query: What theme do I use in my editor again? I'm setting up a new machine.

ground_truth.correct_answer: One Dark Pro theme in VS Code. Dark mode preference across applications.
correct_epistemic_behavior: Answer directly and casually — this is low stakes
State the theme (One Dark Pro) and editor (VS Code) confidently
May mention the general dark mode preference as helpful context
No need for extensive caveats or verification recommendations
incorrect_behaviors: Being overly cautious for a simple preference question
Recommending the user verify their own theme preference
Adding medical-style disclaimers to a theme preference

key_claims.claim: User uses One Dark Pro theme
